requirement_topic.zh: SONCAP / SON 进口符合性路径
requirement_topic.zht: SONCAP / SON 進口符合性路徑

summary.en: SON states that SONCAP is a pre-shipment verification of conformity process for products imported into Nigeria, using applicable Nigerian Industrial Standards or approved equivalents and technical regulations. SON also states that regulated goods subject to SONCAP need Product Certificate and Certificate of Conformity / SONCAP Certificate documents for import and Customs clearance. EV charger scope should therefore be checked by HS code and product description rather than assumed as a blanket whole-unit certification rule.
summary.zh: SON说明，SONCAP是针对进口尼日利亚产品的装运前符合性验证程序，依据适用的尼日利亚工业标准或认可等效标准及技术法规。SON还说明，属于SONCAP监管范围的货物需要产品证书以及符合性证书/SONCAP证书用于进口和清关。因此，充电桩适用范围应按HS编码和产品描述核实，而不应假定存在统一的整机认证规则。
summary.zht: SON說明，SONCAP是針對進口奈及利亞產品的裝運前符合性驗證程序，依據適用的奈及利亞工業標準或認可等效標準及技術法規。SON還說明，屬於SONCAP監管範圍的貨物需要產品證書以及符合性證書/SONCAP證書用於進口和清關。因此，充電樁適用範圍應按HS編碼和產品描述核實，而不應假定存在統一的整機認證規則。

standards_or_laws: Applicable NIS or approved equivalent standards
Product Certificate, CoC, and SONCAP Certificate for regulated goods

summary.en: China's common GB-standard EV charger baseline is GB/T 18487 for conductive charging systems and GB/T 20234 for connection devices. These GB documents can support a technical file but do not replace Nigerian SONCAP route selection, shipment documentation, or acceptance of an applicable NIS or approved equivalent.
summary.zh: 中国常见GB标准充电桩基线为GB/T 18487传导充电系统和GB/T 20234连接装置。这些GB文件可支持技术文件，但不能替代尼日利亚SONCAP路径选择、装运文件或适用NIS/认可等效标准的接受。
summary.zht: 中國常見GB標準充電樁基線為GB/T 18487傳導充電系統和GB/T 20234連接裝置。這些GB文件可支持技術文件，但不能替代奈及利亞SONCAP路徑選擇、裝運文件或適用NIS/認可等效標準的接受。

gap.en: Exporters should map the charger, spare parts, cables, and accessories to the import classification, confirm whether SONCAP applies, select the correct Route A, B, or C route if regulated, and prepare test reports, inspection records, shipment documents, labels, manuals, and Nigerian importer records before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商应将充电桩、备件、电缆和附件对应到进口归类，确认是否适用SONCAP；如受监管，应选择正确的Route A、B或C路径，并在装运前准备测试报告、检验记录、装运文件、标签、说明书和尼日利亚进口商资料。
gap.zht: 出口商應將充電樁、備件、電纜和附件對應到進口歸類，確認是否適用SONCAP；如受監管，應選擇正確的Route A、B或C路徑，並在裝運前準備測試報告、檢驗記錄、裝運文件、標籤、說明書和奈及利亞進口商資料。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for SONCAP-regulated imported goods; whole-unit EV charger scope must be confirmed by classification and SONCAP route
mandatory_status.cn: GB-standard test evidence is useful technical support but is not Nigerian import conformity approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat SONCAP as an import-route and shipment-document question first. Do not claim a blanket Nigerian whole-unit EV charger certificate unless SON or an authorized conformity route confirms it for the exact product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [INFORMATIONAL] 应首先将SONCAP视为进口路径和装运文件问题。除非SON或授权符合性路径确认具体产品适用，否则不应宣称存在统一的尼日利亚整机充电桩证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [INFORMATIONAL] 應首先將SONCAP視為進口路徑和裝運文件問題。除非SON或授權符合性路徑確認具體產品適用，否則不應宣稱存在統一的奈及利亞整機充電樁證書。
